case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. LATANYA WARREN

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF LATANYA WARREN IN OPPOSIOTION TO REQUEST FOR JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT WARREN, LATANYA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WARREN, LATANYA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 60 BLYTHDALE AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94134 $1,603.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,603.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
REQUEST TO SET CASE FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY HEARING SET FOR MAR-19-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 501

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAR-14-2012 VACATED. THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR BECAUSE THERE WAS NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. THE TRIAL DATE OF MAR-19-2012 REMAINS ON CALENDAR.(501/JPT)
